Catalog/Cardiovascular/Dafodil Pericardial Bioprosthesis - Aortic
❤️ CardiovascularREF: DDL19A-DDL27A✓ Brochure Verified

Dafodil Pericardial Bioprosthesis - Aortic

Dafodil · Heart Valves

Dafodil is a tri-leaflet stented bioprosthesis composed of bovine pericardium tissue treated with a proprietary anti-calcification process. It features a Triad-frame design with an Elgiloy alloy wireform and a Triple-Composite design for optimal hemodynamics and durability.

MaterialBovine pericardium tissue
WhatsApp Quote
Full Technical Matrix
Full Technical Matrix

Dafodil Pericardial Bioprosthesis - Aortic

Technical Blueprint SpecificationClinical Value
Storage Temperature
10 °C to 25 °C (50-77 °F)
Rinse Procedure
1 min rinse each in first 3 bowls; store in 4th bowl prior to implantation
MRI Safety Information
MR conditional at 1.5 and 3.0 Tesla
Aortic Available Sizes
19mm, 21mm, 23mm, 25mm, 27mm
Mitral Available Sizes
23mm, 25mm, 27mm, 29mm, 31mm
Aortic Tissue Annulus Diameter Range
20mm to 28.5mm
Aortic External Sewing Ring Diameter Range
27mm to 36mm
Mitral External Sewing Ring Diameter Range
33mm to 43mm
Mitral Stent Diameter (Wire Form) Range
23mm to 29mm

Storage Solution

Glutaraldehyde

Primary Material

Bovine pericardium tissue

CDSCO Validated Data
Frequently Asked Questions

Tri-leaflet stented bioprosthesis designed for aortic valve replacement with triple-composite design providing optimal Effective Orifice Area (EOA). Features bovine pericardium tissue with proprietary anti-calcification treatment and Elgiloy alloy wireform for superior radio-opacity and handling characteristics.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Dafodil Pericardial Bioprosthesis - Aortic, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Dafodil Pericardial Bioprosthesis - Aortic is constructed using Bovine pericardium tissue, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
